name: 熊刀（★） | 虎牙
descriptionEn: This tanto-style survival knife features a faceted blade and full tang, complete with impact pommel. No fuss, no moving parts - just a reliable blade that's ready to work. It has been anodized orange and hand-etched in a tiger stripe pattern. Like the tiger it is rare... like the tiger it is deadly...
descriptionZh: 这把日式短刀风格的求生刀具拥有多面刀刃和带握点的全刀柄。没有任何多余的部分 - 一把时刻准备战斗的可靠武器。 这把武器配上虎纹图案进行了橙黄电镀处理和手工蚀刻。 如虎般珍稀… 如虎般致命…
